issues.title: Missing customer_id in GROUP BY
issues.problem: The query is missing customer_id in the GROUP BY clause, which will cause incorrect aggregation.

issues.title: Case Sensitivity
issues.problem: Table names are in uppercase which is not consistent with typical SQL conventions.
issues.fix:
SELECT customer_id, merchant_id, SUM(amount)
FROM fact_transactions
WHERE status = 'COMPLETED'
GROUP BY customer_id, merchant_id;

review.corrected_sql:
SELECT customer_id, merchant_id, SUM(amount)
FROM fact_transactions
WHERE status = 'COMPLETED'
GROUP BY customer_id, merchant_id;
review.summary: The query had a correctness issue with missing customer_id in the GROUP BY clause and a readability issue with inconsistent case usage.
